name: pipemind-marketplace
description: Marketplace of Claude Code plugins — agents and skills installable into ~/.claude/

plugins.name: spec-driven-development
plugins.description: Agentic workflow factory — compile project-specific planners, builders, and specialist agents for any codebase.

plugins.name: scientific-method
plugins.description: Domain-agnostic scientific method research loop: collaboratively refine problems, then autonomously generate and test hypotheses until solved.

optionalDependencies.name: mcp-semantic-scholar
optionalDependencies.description: Enables structured academic paper search, citation graphs, and reference snowballing. Without it, skills fall back to WebSearch.

plugins.name: mcp-semantic-scholar
plugins.description: Semantic Scholar MCP server for academic paper search, citation graphs, and reference discovery.
